Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include both Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the total time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants (ending with Payment Handled)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Request Payment in variants where no rejection occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in rejected variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that undergo re-submission due to prior rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that bypass PRE_APPROVER entirely versus those that include PRE_APPROVER steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER does not occur

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus those that do not involve PRE_APPROVER at all
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in high-frequency successful variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time until Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER is performed in cases originating from a prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER when followed directly by Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR versus when followed by additional approval or rejection steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'
